compiled_state.title: record-test-status.sh not accessible via dso shim — requires direct hooks/ path
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During sprint execution, attempting to re-record test status after a diff hash change failed with 'dso: command not found: record-test-status.sh'. The script lives at plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh but is not exposed via the .claude/scripts/dso shim. Had to fall back to direct path: bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh.

## Expected
.claude/scripts/dso record-test-status.sh should work like other scripts.

## Actual
dso shim returns 'command not found' for record-test-status.sh.

## Impact
Wastes time discovering the direct path; misleading error message.
